departments.name: Human Resources
departments.responsibility: Onboarding paperwork, benefits, scheduling, people coordination.

departments.name: Finance
departments.responsibility: Budget validation, vendor risk, payroll, procurement.

capabilities.name: hr_manager
capabilities.role: Assigns onboarding tasks to HR workers and synthesizes their results.

capabilities.name: docs_worker
capabilities.role: Determine and send all required onboarding documents with their policy deadlines (NDA and background check before Day 1, I-9, tax, contractor IP, data-privacy agreement for sensitive roles).

capabilities.name: benefits_worker
capabilities.role: Enroll benefits and set payroll/tax by employment type (health 30-day window, 401k immediate with 4% match, life Day 1, PTO from Day 1). Contractors are ineligible.

capabilities.name: scheduler_worker
capabilities.role: Build the day-1 and week-1 onboarding schedule (orientation, IT setup, manager 1:1, team intro) respecting the start date.

capabilities.name: training_worker
capabilities.role: Assign mandatory trainings with policy deadlines (security awareness 7 days, data privacy 14 days, compliance 30 days; PII handling for sensitive roles).

capabilities.name: it_manager
capabilities.role: Assigns provisioning tasks to IT workers and synthesizes their results.

capabilities.name: accounts_worker
capabilities.role: Decide accounts to create (email, SSO, dept tools).

capabilities.name: equipment_worker
capabilities.role: Pick equipment tier by seniority and delivery by location.

capabilities.name: access_worker
capabilities.role: Decide least-privilege access scope; flag sensitive grants.

capabilities.name: finance_manager
capabilities.role: Assigns finance tasks to workers and synthesizes their results.

capabilities.name: budget_worker
capabilities.role: Check amount vs department budget and threshold tier.

capabilities.name: vendor_risk_worker
capabilities.role: Assess vendor credit, breach history, and data-processing risk.

capabilities.name: payroll_worker
capabilities.role: Set up payroll/comp profile or process a payment.

capabilities.name: invoice_validator_worker
capabilities.role: Validate the supplier invoice against Algerian rules: mandatory fields, supplier and customer NIF, fiscal stamp, and correct 19% VAT calculation.

capabilities.name: matching_worker
capabilities.role: Perform three-way matching of the invoice against its purchase order and goods receipt; flag any mismatch.

capabilities.name: fraud_sentinel_worker
capabilities.role: Detect fraud and anomalies: duplicate invoices, split invoices from the same vendor, and amounts placed just below an approval threshold.

capabilities.name: payment_worker
capabilities.role: Schedule the approved supplier payment using the preferred method (bank transfer or cheque).

capabilities.name: compliance_overseer
capabilities.role: Deterministically check hard policy rules; raise a BLOCK on violation.

capabilities.name: risk_overseer
capabilities.role: Deterministically check spend ceilings/anomalies; raise a HALT on breach.

capabilities.name: approver
capabilities.role: Apply authority and threshold rules; route to human approval when required.

capabilities.name: reporter
capabilities.role: Compose the final report, readiness/decision, and audit summary.

request_types.label: Employee Onboarding
request_types.trigger_hint: onboard, new hire, starting, joins, first day

request_types.label: Procurement / Vendor Approval
request_types.trigger_hint: approve, purchase, subscription, license, vendor, buy, $ amount

request_types.label: Supplier Invoice / Accounts Payable (Algeria)
request_types.trigger_hint: invoice, facture, supplier bill, accounts payable, pay supplier, NIF, fiscal stamp, DZD, three-way match
